title: Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram
tagline: Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathy Temple is a Hindu temple in Kottarakkara in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathy Temple is a Hindu temple in Kottarakkara in the Indian state of Kerala. Though the central deity is Shiva, the temple is known for the shrine of Shiva's son Ganesha (Mahaganapathy). Non-Hindus are permitted.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Mylom
topPlaces.description: Mylom is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Malankara Pentecostalism
topPlaces.description: Malankara Pentecostalism originally known as Malankara Poorna Suvisesha Sabha is the first Pentecostal movement in Kerala, India which gave birth to many Pentecostal denominations in Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkannamangal
topPlaces.description: Thrikkannamangal is a village located in the tehsil of Kottarakara in the Kollam district of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kottarakkara
topPlaces.description: Kottarakkara (IAST: Koṭṭārakkara), also transliterated as Kottarakara, is a town and municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Kottarakkara lies 27 kilometres (17 mi) to the east of Kollam city centre.

topPlaces.name: Neduvathoor
topPlaces.description: Neduvathoor is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Padinjaretheruvu
topPlaces.description: Padinjaretheruvu is one of the main village of the outskirts of Kottarakkara town, which is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) west of Kizhekketheruvu on the National Highway 208 (NH 208), in Kollam District, Kerala state, India.

topPlaces.name: Sree Indilayappan Temple
topPlaces.description: Marayikkodu Sree Indilayappan Kshethram (മലയാളം:ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം, മാരായിക്കോട്) is a 1500-year-old Hindu temple in South India. Non-Hindus are permitted in the temple.

topPlaces.name: Vendar
topPlaces.description: Vendar is a village in Kottarakara taluk, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It has many educational institutions and many temples, including Major Sree Subrahmanya swamy Temple, Vendar Devi Temple, Kathiravan Kunnu Sree Balasubrahmanya Swamy Temple, Madathikal Devi Temple.

items.note: Mylom is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.
Malankara Pentecostalism originally known as Malankara Poorna Suvisesha Sabha is the first Pentecostal movement in Kerala, India which gave birth to many Pentecostal denominations in Kerala.
Thrikkannamangal is a village located in the tehsil of Kottarakara in the Kollam district of Kerala, India.

Kottarakkara (IAST: Koṭṭārakkara), also transliterated as Kottarakara, is a town and municipality in the Kollam district of Kerala, India. Kottarakkara lies 27 kilometres (17 mi) to the east of Kollam city centre.
Neduvathoor is a village in Kollam district in the state of Kerala, India.

Padinjaretheruvu is one of the main village of the outskirts of Kottarakkara town, which is 0.5 kilometres (0.31 mi) west of Kizhekketheruvu on the National Highway 208 (NH 208), in Kollam District, Kerala state, India.
Marayikkodu Sree Indilayappan Kshethram (മലയാളം:ഇണ്ടിളയപ്പൻ ക്ഷേത്രം, മാരായിക്കോട്) is a 1500-year-old Hindu temple in South India. Non-Hindus are permitted in the temple.

Vendar is a village in Kottarakara taluk, Kollam district, Kerala, India. It has many educational institutions and many temples, including Major Sree Subrahmanya swamy Temple, Vendar Devi Temple, Kathiravan Kunnu Sree Balasubrahmanya Swamy Temple, Madathikal Devi Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (60 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram?
faq.a: Stays in Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kottarakkara Sree Mahaganapathi Kshethram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mylom, Malankara Pentecostalism, Thrikkannamangal, Kottarakkara, Neduvathoor.
